# rate

**Instance Property**

The playback speed for audio.

## Declaration

```swift
var rate: Double { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEGroupPresetSetting/init(gain:rate:gainCurveType:rateCurveType:)] parameter.

## Setting Playback Speed

- **rateCurveType**: A rate of change for the setting’s playback speed.

items.description: A rate of change for the setting’s playback speed.
